transcript: Speaker A: What is your native language? Speaker B: My native language is Hindi. Speaker A: Wow, your English sounds really good. Speaker B: A few months ago, I didn't speak English at all, and I couldn't get a job. Speaker A: Seriously? How did you learn so fast? Speaker B: I have an AI tutor that helps me. Speaker A: Wow, that's amazing. Show me. Speaker C: हे नेहा, कैसी हो आज? [Hey Neha, how are you today?] Speaker B: I was being interviewed right now. Speaker C: "I was" नहीं, "I am being interviewed right now" बोलना चाहिए। [Not "I was", you should say "I am being interviewed right now".] Speaker B: Oh, I am being interviewed right now. Speaker C: बिल्कुल सही। इंटरव्यू किस बारे में है? [Exactly. What is the interview about?] Speaker B: It's about my English skills. They say me I speak with confidence. Speaker C: "They say me" नहीं, "They say I speak with confidence" होगा। [Not "They say me", it should be "They say I speak with confidence".] Speaker B: You're right. They say I speak with confidence. Speaker C: मेरे साथ हम रोज़ इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव कर सकते हैं। रोज़ 10 मिनट मेरे साथ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करो और आप एक महीने में अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलने लगोगे। [With me, we can improve English daily. Practice English with me for 10 minutes every day and you will start speaking good English in a month.] Speaker C: 50 लाख से ज़्यादा यूज़र्स MySivi में प्रैक्टिस करते हैं। आप भी कर लो। सिर्फ ₹1 में MySivi शुरू करो। [Over 50 lakh users practice on MySivi. You should too. Start MySivi for just ₹1.] Speaker D: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: WHAT IS YOUR NATIVE LANGUAGE MY NATIVE LANGUAGE IS HINDI YOUR ENGLISH SOUNDS GOOD A FEW MONTHS AGO I DIDN'T SPEAK ENGLISH AT ALL AND I COULDN'T GET A JOB HOW DID YOU LEARN SO FAST I HAVE AN AI TUTOR THAT HELPS ME THAT'S AMAZING SHOW ME I WAS BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW I AM BEING INTERVIEWED RIGHT NOW IT'S ABOUT MY ENGLISH SKILLS THEY SAY ME I SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE THEY SAY I SPEAK WITH CONFIDENCE MERE SAATH ROZ ENGLISH IMPROVE KAR SAKTE HAIN ROZ 10 MINUTES MERE SAATH ENGLISH PRACTICE KARO AUR AAP EK MAHINE MEIN ACHHI ENGLISH BOLNE LAGOGE 50 LAKH SE ZYADA USERS MYSIVI MEIN PRACTICE KARTE HAIN AAP BHI KAR LO only at ₹1 Install Now SIRF ₹1 MEIN MYSIVI SHURU KARO MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A street interview transitions into a demonstration of the MySivi AI English-learning app, where an AI avatar corrects a user's spoken English in real-time. The ad highlights daily 10-minute practice sessions and offers a promotional trial for ₹1. The call to action urges viewers to install the app.
